metadata.name: Cognitive Services Application Agent Deployment
metadata.description:
This module creates an agent deployment within an application in a Cognitive Services project.
Agent deployments define how agents within an application are deployed and scaled.
See: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/templates/microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects/applications/agentdeployments
Optional. The agent's unique identifier within the organization (subscription).
Required. The agent's name (unique within the project/app).
Optional. The agent's version (unique for each agent lineage).
The type for a versioned agent reference.
Required. The protocol used by the agent.
Optional. The version of the protocol.
The type for an agent protocol version.
Required. The name of the agent deployment.
Required. The type of deployment.
Optional. The display name of the deployment.
Optional. The description of the deployment.
Optional. The unique identifier of the deployment.
Required. List of agent:version pairs deployed in this deployment.
Required. Protocol types and versions exposed by this deployment.
Optional. The minimum number of replicas. Only applicable when deploymentType is "Hosted".
Optional. The maximum number of replicas. Only applicable when deploymentType is "Hosted".
Optional. Tags for the deployment.
The type for an agent deployment configuration.
Required. The name of the parent Cognitive Services account.
Required. The name of the parent project.
Required. The name of the parent application.
Required. The name of the agent deployment.
Required. The type of deployment. Use "Hosted" for hosted deployments with scaling or "Managed" for managed deployments.
Optional. The display name of the deployment.
Optional. The description of the deployment.
Optional. The unique identifier of the deployment.
Required. List of agent:version pairs deployed in this deployment. Must contain at least one entry.
Required. Protocol types and versions exposed by this deployment.
Optional. The minimum number of replicas for hosted deployments. Only applicable when deploymentType is "Hosted".
Optional. The maximum number of replicas for hosted deployments. Only applicable when deploymentType is "Hosted".
Optional. Tags for the deployment.

agentDeployment.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}/{3}', parameters('accountName'), parameters('projectName'), parameters('applicationName'), parameters('name'))]
agentDeployment.properties: [union(createObject('deploymentType', parameters('deploymentType'), 'agents', parameters('agents'), 'protocols', parameters('protocols')), if(not(equals(parameters('displayName'), null())), createObject('displayName', parameters('displayName')), createObject()), if(not(equals(parameters('description'), null())), createObject('description', parameters('description')), createObject()), if(not(equals(parameters('deploymentId'), null())), createObject('deploymentId', parameters('deploymentId')), createObject()), if(not(equals(parameters('tags'), null())), createObject('tags', parameters('tags')), createObject()), if(equals(parameters('deploymentType'), 'Hosted'), createObject('minReplicas', parameters('minReplicas'), 'maxReplicas', parameters('maxReplicas')), createObject()))]

metadata.description: The resource ID of the agent deployment.
The name of the agent deployment.
The name of the resource group the agent deployment was created in.
